title: pteris dichotoma var. australis
intro: Pteris dichotoma var. australis, also known as the Austral fern or Australian bracken fern, is a species of fern found in Australia and New Zealand. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The health benefits of Pteris dichotoma var. australis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections.
